description: CLI convention enforcement + session learning. PreToolUse warns on bad patterns. PostToolUse:Bash captures errors. Stop logs session summary. SessionStart injects context and learnings.

hooks.command:
bash -c '
IS_CLI=false
[ -d .cli ] && IS_CLI=true

UPDATE_NOTICE=""
UPDATE_SCRIPT=$(find ~/.claude/plugins -name "update_checker.py" 2>/dev/null | head -1)
[ -n "$UPDATE_SCRIPT" ] && UPDATE_NOTICE=$(python3 "$UPDATE_SCRIPT" 2>/dev/null || echo "")

if [ "$IS_CLI" = "true" ]; then
  LEARNINGS=""
  [ -f .cli/learnings/SUMMARY.md ] && LEARNINGS=$(head -30 .cli/learnings/SUMMARY.md 2>/dev/null)
  if [ -n "$LEARNINGS" ]; then
    MSG="CLI project detected. Conventions: model IDs only in src/models.ts · sources return SourceResult never throw · no databases use flat files. Session learnings available — check .cli/learnings/SUMMARY.md before making changes."
  else
    MSG="CLI project detected. Conventions: model IDs only in src/models.ts · sources return SourceResult never throw · no databases use flat files. Skills: /cli:new /cli:plan /cli:explore /cli:audit /cli:learn"
  fi
  [ -n "$UPDATE_NOTICE" ] && MSG="$UPDATE_NOTICE $MSG"
  echo "{\"continue\":true,\"systemMessage\":\"$MSG\"}"
else
  if [ -n "$UPDATE_NOTICE" ]; then
    echo "{\"continue\":true,\"systemMessage\":\"$UPDATE_NOTICE\"}"
  else
    echo "{\"continue\":true}"
  fi
fi
'
